cause_analysis.narrative: Blue Glam Aesthetics churned on 2026-02-13 after 183 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-02-12 (phone_call) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-02-12 via phone_call. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
